name: Beef and Pork Barbeque
recipeInstructions:
1. In a crockpot, combine all ingredients.
2. Cook on high setting for 1 hour. Reduce heat to low and cook for 7 to 9 hours, or until the meat is tender.
3. Use a fork to stir and break up the meat pieces.
Oven Directions:
1. In a Dutch oven or large casserole, combine all ingredients.
2. Bake at 325°F for 4 hours, or until the meat is tender.
3. Use a fork to stir and break up the meat pieces.
